description: Card 1995 baseline: log(wage) ~ educ + exper_c + exper_c² + black + south + smsa + married, OLS, HC3
IV2SLS with nearc4: first-stage F=15.7 strong but educ_coef=0.125 outside multiverse band (LATE > OLS)
add region dummies reg662-reg669: CV-MSE improved (0.1347) but VIF=17.2 (collinearity with south)
add IQ+KWW: ability bias drops educ to 0.058 (Griliches), CV-MSE 0.132 best yet, but VIF=69 (IQ-KWW collinearity)
add IQ only: educ=0.068, CV-MSE 0.133, but VIF=52 (IQ correlates with demographics in non-missing-IQ subsample)
drop married: clean diagnostics (BP=0.37, VIF=5.1) but CV-MSE 0.140 vs best 0.136 (3.4% worse)
trim top/bottom 1% lwage: CV-MSE 0.1198 (-12% vs baseline), all dimensions 5/5, new running best
momdad14==1 + 1% trim: CV-MSE 0.122 vs best 0.120 (1.9% worse, > 0.5% threshold)
